features.name: Harness context budget pass
features.description: Reduce startup token load by keeping root state files concise and moving detailed evidence to reports and version docs.
definition_of_done: AGENTS.md tells future agents to read root state first and avoid full changelog/report ingestion unless needed.
feature_list.json tracks only the current feature, one near-term art track, and recent harness maintenance.
progress.md gives restart state, blockers, verification evidence, and next step in under about 1,000 words.
Root and docs session handoffs point to detailed reports instead of repeating every implementation event.
harness-creator validation stays green.
evidence: 2026-05-23: Root startup files were compressed and a Context Budget section was added to AGENTS.md.
2026-05-23: harness-creator validation stayed 100/100; npm run harness:gate passed with 43 files / 366 tests, data validation, and production build.
features.next_step: Keep detailed implementation history in reports and update root files only with summaries.

features.name: 20-30 minute blind playtest slice lock
features.description: Stop adding broad systems and validate a web-alpha slice where new players reach first launch, see card impact, encounter rival/staff incidents, and reach one annual review.
definition_of_done: Pre-art slice covers first launch, card payoff, reward/growth, rival/staff incident, and annual review.
Blind preflight verifies tutorial modal delay and flags missing remote playtest URL before external/AGY sessions are sent.
qa:asset-handoff reports final art request possible before AGY/external art requests go out (P2 follow-up gate).
npm run harness:gate passes after any fixes.

features.name: Core fun polish (first 30 minute UX)
features.description: Polish the first 30 minute experience after the v0.56 slice locked: launch impact connoting card cause, card effect visibility, balanced product catalogue, staff burnout pacing, and year-two onboarding flow.
definition_of_done: First launch result has entry animations and shine.
Cards explicitly visualize their effect (card name -> arrow -> effects) at launch impact and reward choice.
Curated 30 product catalogue covers education, mobility, robotics, semiconductors, and odd industries.
Burnout aftermath progress/quality penalty is eased so early game does not become fatigue avoidance.
First 30 minute attrition risks (first screen impact, first hire pulse, year-two onboarding ambiguity, release ETA legibility, reward rarity differentiation) are reduced.
npm run harness:gate passes.

features.name: Market season strength (rival presence, market share visualization, response cards, big event popup)
features.description: Make competitors feel alive by visualizing market share, surfacing rival archetype/weakness, response cards, and big event popup. Closed 2026-05-29 across 5 isolated blocks (#1 visualization, #2 history+sparkline, #3 archetype/weakness, #4 response card differentiation, #5 big event popup) plus a closeout commit. All blocks were derive-only or queue-only — no simulation tick behavior changes.
definition_of_done: Market share visualization HUD panel shows player vs 13 competitors using derive-only data (no simulation changes).
Top pressure competitor highlighted with shared color/badge.
Rival archetype/weakness surfaced near the market share panel.
Response card differentiation makes rival pressure feel like a card need.
Big event popup on annual challenger entry uses competitors[].entry_announcement.
Each block adds one layout-contract it block.
Mobile 390x844 stays unbroken.
npm run harness:gate passes.
evidence: 2026-05-27: v0.58 entry chosen as next milestone. Track A (market share visualization, Claude Code direct) starts with current-snapshot stacked bar; sparkline deferred to v0.58 #2 because CompetitorState lacks history. Track B (AGY 5x agent review automation) and Track C (v0.57 P2 mobile polish backlog) prepared as Codex CLI handoff at reports/codex-handoff/v0_58_track_b_agy_review.md and reports/codex-handoff/v0_57_track_c_p2_mobile_backlog.md.

2026-05-27: v0.58 #1 market share visualization HUD panel shipped at 9a5d493 (derive-only stacked bar + top-pressure highlight + ?scenario=market-share registration); npm run harness:gate passed 43 files / 411 tests / build 689ms.

2026-05-27: v0.58 #2 marketShareHistory tracking + sparkline shipped. Added MarketShareHistoryEntry type, GameState.marketShareHistory field, advanceCompetitors pushes 24-month sliding window, sanitizeMarketShareHistory handles save migrations, MarketSharePanel renders 2-polyline SVG (player vs top rival). npm run harness:gate passed 43 files / 412 tests / build 720ms.

2026-05-27: v0.58 #3 rival archetype/weakness surfacing shipped via new RivalArchetypePanel mounted under MarketSharePanel. Renders top 3 rivals by getRivalCounterPlans pressureScore with archetype + weakness from competitors[].archetype_key/weakness_key (ko+en i18n keys populated) and severity color coding (contested red, strategic orange, watch blue). Derive-only; no simulation changes. npm run harness:gate passed 43 files / 413 tests.

2026-05-29: v0.58 #5 big event popup on annual challenger entry shipped. New BigEventModal.tsx renders pendingChallengerEntryIds queue head as a centered modal with tier-pill / archetype / weakness / dismiss button. addScheduledCompetitors pushes annual_challenger and late_boss ids to the queue when they enter; dismissChallengerEntry shifts the head. Late_boss tier gets a red glow accent. New ?scenario=big-event QA route fast-forwards to month 13 so autonovaMotors / brewchain modals trigger immediately. npm run harness:gate passed 43 files / 414 tests.

2026-05-29: v0.58 #4 response card differentiation shipped at 72d5d3a. Exported isCounterCard (tags.counter or rival_*_delta effects) + new getRivalCounterSignal(state) deriving high/low/none from getRivalCounterPlans severity. MenuPanels.tsx DeckPanel computes the signal once, then injects a '압박 대응' badge + glow on counter cards in both hand and reward-choice UI; high tier pulses (with prefers-reduced-motion fallback). Derive-only; no state model changes. npm run harness:gate passed 43 files / 415 tests.

2026-05-29: v0.58 closeout — milestone marked completed. All 5 functional DoD bullets done across 9a5d493 / f31088e / fb1abd6 / 72d5d3a / 8df6bde + this closeout commit. No simulation tick behavior changes; #2 added marketShareHistory as derive-only history and #5 added pendingChallengerEntryIds as a UI signal queue, both with save migrations. Final harness:gate state: 43 files / 415 tests / production build under 800ms.

features.name: Boundaryless industry expansion slice (3 new physical industries + cross-industry synergies + combos)
features.description: Validate the fun of expanding beyond software into physical industries (ROADMAP v0.60, renumbered from v0.59 after resource-visibility took the v0.59 number). Add 3 new physical-industry domains (manufacturing, logistics, energy) on top of the existing 12, wire robot/manufacturing/logistics requirement conditions, add 10 cross-industry synergies and 10 high-risk/high-reward combos. Controlled slice only — ROADMAP §5 forbids mass industry expansion, so this stays at exactly 3 new industries. Multi-session; decomposed into isolated blocks.
definition_of_done: Block #1 (DONE 2026-05-29): 3 new physical-industry domains (manufacturing, logistics, energy) added to data/domains.json with unlock_requirements reusing existing capabilities; 6 starter products (2 per domain) gated so none are launchable at game start; new domains flow into the existing boundaryless-expansion goals + product domain filters; ?scenario=physical-industries added; tests for locked filters / QA route / boundaryless goals; harness:gate 43 files / 420 tests; simulation.ts untouched.

Block #2 (DONE 2026-05-29): added manufacturing + logistics capabilities (completing the robot/manufacturing/logistics trio with the existing robotics); manufacturing unlocks_domains {1:manufacturing,3:energy} effects automation, logistics unlocks_domains {1:logistics} effects automation/data; re-gated the 3 physical domains to the trio; data-driven so simulation.ts untouched; harness:gate 43 files / 421 tests.
Block #3: 10 cross-industry synergies (data + derive/display, mirroring office_synergies / deck_synergies).
Block #4: 10 high-risk/high-reward combos (data + UI).
Each block adds at least one test; npm run harness:gate passes; no unintended simulation regressions.
Stays a controlled 3-industry slice per ROADMAP §5 (no mass expansion).
evidence: 2026-05-29: Selected after the v0.59 closeout. ROADMAP renumbered (v0.59=resource-visibility shipped; industry slice -> v0.60; public web alpha -> v0.61). Decomposed into 4 blocks; block #1 (3 new physical-industry domains foundation) delegated to Codex CLI (gpt-5.5, xhigh) at reports/codex-handoff/v0_60_block1_physical_domains.md. Existing domain set already has 12 domains incl. robotics/mobility/semiconductors; the 3 new ones are manufacturing/logistics/energy.

2026-05-29: Block #1 implemented by Codex CLI and verified by Claude Code. domains.json +3 (manufacturing {robotics,optimization}, logistics {agent,optimization}, energy {optimization,enterprise}); products.json +6 (2 per domain, gated by capabilities + trust 55-78 so none launchable at start); new domains wired into the pre-existing src/game/boundaryless-expansion.ts goal system (expansionDomainIds + payoffByDomain); ?scenario=physical-industries lands on the products panel with the 3 domains unlocked; 3 new tests. simulation.ts untouched. Independently verified npm run harness:gate: 43 files / 420 tests, validate:data passed, build 106 modules.

2026-05-29: Block #2 implemented by Codex CLI and verified by Claude Code. Added manufacturing + logistics capabilities to capabilities.json + starting_state.json (now 12 capabilities); manufacturing unlocks_domains {1:manufacturing,3:energy} effects {automation:3}, logistics unlocks_domains {1:logistics} effects {automation:2,data:4}; re-gated the manufacturing/logistics/energy domains to the robot/manufacturing/logistics trio (manufacturing domain now {robotics:1,manufacturing:1,optimization:1}, logistics {logistics:1,agent:2,optimization:1}, energy {manufacturing:3,optimization:2,enterprise:1}). Capabilities are data-driven (Record<string,number> + upgradeCapability reads unlocks_domains) so simulation.ts was untouched. Independently verified npm run harness:gate: 43 files / 421 tests, validate:data passed, build 106 modules.
features.next_step: Blocks #1-#2 done. Next: block #3 (10 cross-industry synergies) to Codex CLI, then #4 (10 high-risk/high-reward combos).
